chunks.title: The Day of Yahweh and the Locust Army
chunks.reason: Describes the terrifying arrival of a vast army as a sign of God's judgment.

chunks.title: Call to Repentance and Fasting
chunks.reason: God calls the people to return with all their hearts through fasting and weeping.

chunks.title: Promise of Restoration and Deliverance
chunks.reason: God promises to remove the northern army and restore the land's fertility.

chunks.title: Outpouring of the Spirit and Final Salvation
chunks.reason: Prophesies the future pouring out of the Spirit on all flesh and salvation for those who call on the Lord.
